fire.name: Flame Dart
fire.description: With enough practice, anything can become a dart board!

fire.name: Heart's Fire
fire.effect: Give an ally within Range an extra action. Spend 1 mana to cast this when it is not your turn.

fire.name: Ignite
fire.damage: 4d10 to a Smoldering target, ending the condition on hit.
fire.description: The flames do not consume flesh—but hope.

fire.name: Enchant Weapon
fire.effect: A weapon you touch is enchanted with magical flame. It deals +KEY damage and inflicts Smoldering on crit.
fire.description: It's like a regular dagger, but SPICY!

fire.name: Flame Barrier
fire.effect: Defend for free. Until the start of your next turn, melee attackers against you take KEY damage (ignoring armor) and gain Smoldering.

fire.name: Pyroclasm
fire.damage: 2d20+10 damage (ignoring armor) on a failed DEX save. Half damage on save. Smoldering creatures fail.

fire.name: Fiery Embrace
fire.effect: While within Reach: 1 ally gains the effects of Enchant Weapon. Enemies gain Smoldering, lose damage resistance, and their damage immunity is reduced to resistance.
fire.description: Less 'warm and fuzzy,' more 'burnt and crispy.'

fire.name: Living Inferno
fire.effect: Gain the effects of Flame Barrier until your next turn. At the end of this turn and your next turn, cast Pyroclasm for free.
fire.description: Ever since falling into a spider's burrow, Gregor's never been the same—and neither have the spiders.

fire.name: Dragonform
fire.effect: Transform into a Huge dragon. Gain 3 actions, a fly speed of 12, LVL Armor, 10×LVL temp HP, and special abilities.

abilities.name: Immolating Breath
abilities.description: 2 Actions: (Reach: Cone 8). DC 20 DEX save, KEY d20 damage, half on save. Smoldering targets fail.

ice.name: Snowblind
ice.effect: On hit: Blinded until the end of their next turn.
ice.description: Everyone always says blind is dark, nope... blind is COLD!

ice.name: Frost Shield
ice.effect: Gain 2×KEY temp HP and Defend for free. The ice melts and these temp HP are lost at the start of your next turn.
ice.description: Most seek refuge from the cold; for us, the cold IS our refuge.

ice.name: Shatter
ice.damage: 3d6. If any die rolls the max against a Hampered target, this counts as a crit. On crit: +20 damage.
ice.upcast: Increase the result of ANY die by 1. +5 damage on crit.
ice.description: The sound it makes is beautiful—if you're not standing too close.

ice.name: Cryosleep
ice.effect: Creatures in a 2×2 area within Reach are Dazed. On a failed STR save, they fall asleep instead, becoming Incapacitated until their next two turns have passed, until damaged, or until an ally uses an action to wake them.

ice.name: Rimeblades
ice.effect: Conjure razor-sharp icy spikes in 5 contiguous spaces within Reach; this area is difficult terrain. Creatures that enter these spaces (or who are in the area when you conjure them) suffer 2d6 damage for each space they touch.
ice.description: Step lightly, or not at all.

ice.name: Arctic Blast
ice.damage: 4d6+10 damage. This area is difficult terrain until the end of your next turn. Surviving creatures must make a STR save or be frozen in place (Restrained) until the end of their next turn; creatures already Hampered are Incapacitated for 1 turn instead.
ice.description: A storm of ice answers my call!

ice.name: Glacier Strike
ice.damage: d66 bludgeoning to creatures in a 3×3 area. Creatures adjacent to that area take half as much. The entire area permanently becomes difficult terrain.
ice.description: The cold's bad, sure, but it's the smush that gets you!

ice.name: Arctic Annihilation
ice.effect: Choose any number of objects or willing creatures within Reach to encase in ice. They are Incapacitated and immune to damage and negative effects until the start of their next turn. All other creatures and objects within Reach take d66 damage. Any surviving creature who took this damage must make a STR save or be Incapacitated for 1 round.
ice.note: Once you cast this spell, you must Safe Rest for 1 week before using it again.

lightning.name: Zap
lightning.effect: On miss: the lightning fails to find ground, and strikes you instead.
lightning.description: Remember to stay grounded, young mage, or the spell will gladly do it for you.

lightning.name: Overload
lightning.condition: Castable only if you are Charged, ending the condition.
lightning.description: That time I missed? Yeah, I did that on purpose!

lightning.name: Arc Lightning
lightning.damage: 3d8, also strikes the next closest creature to your target
lightning.effect: On miss: the lightning fails to find ground and strikes you instead.
lightning.description: Lightning loves company—though it's rarely a pleasant reunion.

lightning.name: Alacrity
lightning.effect: Defend for free. After damage is dealt, you gain the Charged condition then teleport anywhere within Range.

lightning.name: Stormlash
lightning.effect: Surviving creatures are Dazed on a failed STR save, or Incapacitated instead for 1 turn if they fail by 5 or more. Creatures with a large amount of metal (e.g., armor or a longsword) roll with disadvantage.

lightning.name: Electrickery
lightning.effect: Choose another creature within Range to swap places with your ally on a failed WIL save (they become the new target). Costs 1 Action while Charged, ending the condition.
lightning.description: Misdirection is the heart of magic.

lightning.name: Electrocharge
lightning.effect: A creature you touch gains the Charged condition, +1 max action, +5 armor, 2x speed, and advantage on DEX saves.
lightning.description: Ever wonder what it's like to drink lightning?

lightning.name: Ride the Lightning
lightning.effect: Teleport up to 12 spaces away to a spot you can see (if a willing creature is there, swap places with them). Adjacent creatures take d88 damage. Surviving creatures must make a STR save or be hurled back 3 spaces, knocked Prone, and deafened for 1 day.
lightning.description: Horse? No. Ship? No... Lightning?! NOW WE'RE TALKING!

lightning.name: Seething Storm
lightning.effect: You become a cloud of tempestuous storm. You can fly, move for free 1/round, and attacks against you are made with disadvantage. At the end of each of your turns, strike up to 4 creatures within Reach with a bolt of lightning for d88 damage (a creature can only be struck 1/round). +2 Reach and number of bolts each round. Costs 3 actions each round to maintain.
lightning.note: Once you cast this spell, you must Safe Rest for 1 week before you can use it again.
lightning.description: The sky bends to me, the clouds rage with me, and the world trembles below.

wind.name: Razor Wind
wind.effect: Also damages up to 1 adjacent target.
wind.description: Wield the blade that never dulls.

wind.name: Breath of Life
wind.effect: Restore 1 HP to a Dying creature.
wind.description: The gentlest breeze can reignite a dying flame.

wind.name: Blustery Gale
wind.damage: 3d4 bludgeoning, advantage against flying, Small, or Tiny targets.
wind.effect: On hit: Move a Med target 2 spaces away; Small/Tiny twice as far; Large half as far (round down). For each die you would roll due to forced movement from this spell, deal +5 damage instead.
wind.description: Now THIS is why I love cliffs!

wind.name: Barrier of Wind
wind.effect: Defend for free. Ranged attacks have disadvantage against you this round (including the triggering attack).

wind.name: Fly
wind.effect: Touch a creature, grant a flying speed of 12.

wind.name: Eye of the Storm
wind.effect: You may place surviving creatures anywhere within 1 space of the storm's Reach on a failed STR save.
wind.description: You asked how I know a storm's coming?

wind.name: Updraft
wind.effect: Enemies within a 5×5 area must repeat a DEX save until they succeed. For each time they failed they suffer 1d6 falling damage and land prone.
wind.description: It's not the fall that gets you, it's the sudden stop.

wind.name: Thousand Cuts
wind.damage: d44 slashing damage (roll with advantage), also damages enemies within Reach 1 of your target.
wind.description: D44 with advantage. Roll 3d4 and drop the lowest die. The leftmost die is the tens place, and the second is the ones (e.g., 2, 3, and 4 deals 34 damage).
wind.special: You’re going to need a LOT of bandages.

wind.name: Boisterous Winds
wind.effect: You and up to 12 allies within Reach 12 gain: Ranged attacks have disadvantage against you, a flying speed of 12, and can move for free 1/round.
wind.description: A tailwind for the brave, a headwind for the unworthy.

wind.name: Wind Whisper
wind.effect: You whisper a message into the wind and it will be secretly carried to a specified target within 100 miles/160 km.

wind.name: Helpful Gust
wind.effect: Gently move a Tiny unheld item within Reach in any direction. OR: Generate an illusory scent.

wind.name: Feather Fall
wind.effect: REACTION: When a creature falls, cause them to gently float to the ground, unharmed.

wind.name: Vicious Mockery
wind.effect: The is Taunted during their next turn.

radiant.name: Rebuke
radiant.damage: 1d6 (ignoring armor), does not miss. 2× damage against undead or cowardly (those Frightened or behind cover).

radiant.name: True Strike
radiant.effect: Give a creature advantage on the next attack they make (until the end of their next turn).

radiant.name: Heal
radiant.upcast: Choose one: +1 target, +4 Reach, +1d6 healing. If 5+ mana is spent, you may also heal 1 negative condition (e.g., Blind, Poisoned, 1 Wound).
radiant.description: Let all who are afflicted come. I will mend thy bones and soothe thy wounds.

radiant.name: Warding Bond
radiant.effect: Designate a willing creature as your ward for 1 minute. They take half damage from all attacks; you are attacked for the other half.
radiant.description: I will be your shield and salvation.

radiant.name: Shield of Justice
radiant.effect: Defend for free and reflect Radiant damage back at the attacker equal to the amount blocked (ignoring armor).
radiant.description: The righteous defend not with steel, but with unwavering resolve.

radiant.name: Condemn
radiant.damage: 30. Can only target an enemy that crit you or an ally since your last turn. Cannot be reduced by any means. The next attack against that enemy is made with advantage.
radiant.description: For what you've done, there is no escape—only judgment.

radiant.name: Vengeance
radiant.damage: 1d100, to a creature that attacked a Dying ally or reduced one to 0 HP since your last turn.
radiant.description: Justice must be proportional and meted out dispassionately; vengeance, however, has no such constraints.

radiant.name: Sacrifice
radiant.effect: Reduce yourself to 0 HP. You cannot have more than 0 HP until you Safe Rest. Heal a number of HP equal to your maximum HP, divided as you choose to any other creatures within Reach. You may revive a creature that has died in the past minute if you give them at least 20 HP (also healing 2 Wounds from them), provided they have not been revived with this spell before.
radiant.description: Greater love has no one than this, than to lay down one's life for his friends.

radiant.name: Redeem
radiant.cost: A diamond worth at least 10,000 gp, which this spell consumes.
radiant.effect: Revive any number of deceased creatures you choose—within 1 mile—that have died in the past year, provided they have not died of old age or been revived with this spell before.
radiant.description: The power to undo death's hold is a heavy burden.

necrotic.name: Entice
necrotic.effect: On hit: target moves 2 spaces closer to you.
necrotic.high_levels: Increment the die 1 step every 5 levels (d6 » d8 » d10 » d12).

necrotic.name: Withering Touch
necrotic.effect: On hit: Target is considered undead for 1 round.
necrotic.description: Last time I ever give you roses...

necrotic.name: Shadow Trap
necrotic.effect: The next creature to move adjacent to you suffers 3d12 damage; if Small or Tiny, it is also Restrained by shadowy tendrils for as long as you maintain concentration or until they escape.
necrotic.upcast: +1 size category, +1d12 damage when they escape
necrotic.description: When he smiles like that, stay far away.

necrotic.name: Dread Visage
necrotic.effect: Defend for free. Melee attackers are Frightened of you and suffer 1d12 damage if they attack you this round. Costs 2 mana less while dying.
necrotic.description: I am become your dread and terror.

necrotic.name: Vampiric Greed
necrotic.effect: Gain 1 Wound. Deal 4d12 damage to all adjacent creatures, heal HP equal to the damage done. Any surviving creatures make a STR save. Gain 1 additional Wound for each creature that saves.
necrotic.description: I feel MUCH better—and somehow, also worse.

necrotic.name: Greater Shadow
necrotic.effect: Summon a 5d12 Greater Shadow minion (max 1) adjacent to you. When it dies, it explodes into 5 shadow minions (see Summon Shadow). Place them anywhere within 8 spaces.
necrotic.description: No, don't attack the big one!

necrotic.name: Gangrenous Burst
necrotic.effect: Other damaged creatures within Reach must make a STR save or take 3d20 damage (ignoring armor), half on save. The save is rolled with disadvantage while Bloodied.
necrotic.description: BAD idea to bleed near a necromancer.

necrotic.name: Unspeakable Word
necrotic.damage: d66 (with advantage, ignoring armor, does not miss or crit) on a failed INT save.
necrotic.effect: Target rolls with disadvantage if Bloodied or Frightened. On a success, you both take half of this damage instead.
necrotic.description: I know a NAUGHTY word—wanna hear it?

necrotic.name: Creeping Death
necrotic.effect: If this kills the creature, it violently erupts, and you MUST deal the same amount of damage to another creature within 8 spaces of it that has not yet been damaged by this effect. Repeat until a creature survives this damage or no other creatures are within Reach.

necrotic.name: Shadow Blast
necrotic.description: One good reason to be afraid of the dark!

necrotic.name: Summon Shadow
necrotic.effect: Summon a shadow minion within Reach 1 (you can summon a max of INT or LVL minions this way, whichever is lower). Your shadow minions follow the normal minion rules: they have 1 HP, no damage bonus, and do not crit. They abandon you immediately outside of combat.

abilities.name: Command
abilities.effect: (1/turn) you may command ALL of your minions to move up to 6 then attack (Reach 1, d12 each).

necrotic.description: When he smiles like that, stay far away.

utility.name: Ice Disk
utility.effect: Conjure a disk of ice that floats just above the ground and follows you. It can carry up to 250 lbs./115 kg of weight for 1 hour or until you cast this spell again.

utility.name: Chillcraft
utility.effect: Harmlessly freeze, thaw, or move a bath-sized amount of water near you. OR: Conjure a sheet of opaque, mirror-like, or transparent ice the size of a window or small door.

utility.name: Wintry Scrying
utility.effect: Turn a small patch of water into a reflective icy mirror. Looking though it grants you vision of any desired location near this same body of water for 10 minutes.

utility.name: Firebrand
utility.effect: Touch a surface and secretly mark it with a symbol or brief message. Speaking a chosen command word while nearby reveals it.

utility.name: Fire Step
utility.effect: Teleport to a fire source you can see.

utility.name: Kindle
utility.effect: Conjure a minor visual illusion. OR: Ignite a small, unheld item within Range 6.

utility.name: Spark Buddy
utility.effect: Conjure a Tiny (squirrel-sized) electrical helper for up to 1 hour. It can fetch Tiny objects (~1 lb./500 g max), open unlocked doors, illuminate a small area, or deliver a harmless shock.

utility.name: Spark Step
utility.effect: Teleport to a metal object.

utility.name: Tempest’s Command
utility.effect: DISPEL a minor magical effect, or temporarily suppress a stronger one (the more powerful an enchantment, the shorter the duration). OR: Your eyes glow and your voice is amplified to a booming, thunder-like volume for 1 min.

utility.name: Light
utility.effect: Cause an item to brightly glow as a torch with radiant light for as long as you hold it.

utility.name: Beautify
utility.effect: Clean stains or repair a small tear/break in a non-magical item, or conjure tiny beautiful things: flowers, butterflies, etc.

utility.name: Bond of Peace
utility.effect: BOND. Telepathically communicate simple thoughts or feelings with a friendly creature you can see. OR: PEACE. Imbue your spoken words with calming magic, granting advantage on any check made to soothe anger or fear in creatures who can hear you.

utility.name: Wind Whisper
utility.effect: You whisper a message into the wind and it will be secretly carried to a specified target within 100 miles/160 km.

utility.name: Helpful Gust
utility.effect: Gently move a Tiny unheld item within Reach in any direction. OR: Generate an illusory scent.

utility.name: Feather Fall
utility.effect: REACTION: When a creature falls, cause them to gently float to the ground, unharmed.

utility.name: Gravecraft
utility.effect: GRAVEMARK. Action: Soil a surface with blood, filth, or other disgusting things. OR: GRAVEWORK. Casting time 1 minute: Shape/move a body-sized plot of earth.

utility.name: False Face
utility.effect: Change your appearance to look like someone else for 10 minutes. Requires a piece of them.

utility.name: Thought Leech
utility.effect: Read the surface thoughts of a creature within Reach. Creatures can sense you doing this and may not like it.

utility.name: Lifebinding Spirit
utility.effect: Summon a spirit companion that follows you and is immune to harm. It lasts until you cast this spell again, take a Safe Rest, or it heals a number of times equal to the mana spent summoning it.

abilities.name: Attack or Heal
abilities.effect: It attacks or heals a creature within Reach 4. It attacks for 1d6+WIL radiant damage (ignoring armor), or heals for the same amount.

utility.upcast: Increment its die size by 1 (max d12), +1 healing use.
utility.description: Your Lifebinding Spirit can take the form of any small friendly animal or similar creature (dog, lamb, rabbit, sparrow, etc.). Make sure you give your little buddy a name, too!

utility.name: Shadow Blast
utility.description: One good reason to be afraid of the dark!

utility.name: Summon Shadow
utility.effect: Summon a shadow minion within Reach 1 (you can summon a max of INT or LVL minions this way, whichever is lower). Your shadow minions follow the normal minion rules: they have 1 HP, no damage bonus, and do not crit. They abandon you immediately outside of combat.

abilities.name: Command
abilities.effect: (1/turn) you may command ALL of your minions to move up to 6 then attack (Reach 1, d12 each).

utility.description: When he smiles like that, stay far away.
